tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"cisco-switch","command":"configure terminal
ip access-list extended ICMP_ACL
 permit icmp host 192.168.1.3 any
exit
class-map match-any ICMP_CLASS
 match access-group name ICMP_ACL
exit
policy-map POLICE_ICMP
 class ICMP_CLASS
  police 50000 8000 conform-action transmit exceed-action drop
exit
interface Gi0/1
 service-policy input POLICE_ICMP
exit
end
write memory"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
configure terminal
          ^
% Invalid input detected at '^' marker.

Switch>ip access-list extended ICMP_ACL
       ^
% Invalid input detected at '^' marker.

Switch> permit icmp host 192.168.1.3 any
         ^
% Invalid input detected at '^' marker.

Switch>exit

































Switch con0 is now available





Press RETURN to get started.

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"cisco-switch","command":"enable
configure terminal
ip access-list extended ICMP_FROM_HOST
 permit icmp host 192.168.1.3 any
 exit
class-map match-any ICMP_CLASS
 match access-group name ICMP_FROM_HOST
 exit
policy-map POLICE_ICMP
 class ICMP_CLASS
  police 8000 1000 conform-action transmit exceed-action drop
 exit
interface GigabitEthernet0/1
 service-policy input POLICE_ICMP
 exit
end
write memory"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
enable
Switch#configure terminal
Enter configuration commands, one per line.  End with CNTL/Z.
Switch(config)#ip access-list extended ICMP_FROM_HOST
Switch(config-ext-nacl)# permit icmp host 192.168.1.3 any
Switch(config-ext-nacl)# exit
Switch(config)#class-map match-any ICMP_CLASS
Switch(config-cmap)# match access-group name ICMP_FROM_HOST
Switch(config-cmap)# exit
Switch(config)#policy-map POLICE_ICMP
Switch(config-pmap)# class ICMP_CLASS
Switch(config-pmap-c)#  police 8000 1000 conform-action transmit exceed-actio$00 1000 conform-action transmit exceed-action          drop
Switch(config-pmap-c-police)# exit
Switch(config-pmap-c)#interface GigabitEthernet0/1
Switch(config-if)# service-policy input POLICE_ICMP
Switch(config-if)# exit
Switch(config)#end
Switch#write memory
Building configuration...
Compressed configuration from 3587 bytes to 1710 bytes
*Mar 21 13:07:37.745: %SYS-5-CONFIG_I: Configured from console by console[OK]
Switch#
Switch#
